title: Urostachya euryantha

The plant belongs to the genus Urostachya, which is a group of epiphytic orchids. These plants are known to grow on other plants or trees, often in humid environments. Urostachya euryantha is a rare and unique species, adding to the diversity of plant life in its native habitats.
